nodes.description: You are, at the moment, the luckiest person in Whitestone. Do you know why? Because you're at the bottom of my list.   Sideshow Art Prints presents the Percival de Rolo: Manifestation of the List Fine Art Print, an official Critical Role art print by artist Livia Prima depicting a fateful moment for Vox Machina's sharpshooter.  Pacts made in the shadows mark a path towards retribution for Percival Fredrickstein von Musel Klossowski de Rolo III, the aggrieved son of Whitestone's slaughtered nobility. In Percival de Rolo: Manifestation of the List, visions of vengeance guide his hands as he builds Tal'Dorei's first firearm — a pepperbox pistol enchanted with the names of his intended victims on its barrel. The smoke monster Orthax rises from the fires of his forge, guiding Percy through sleepless nights of hatred against the ones who harmed his family: Professor Anders, Sir Kerrion Stonefell, Doctor Ripley, Lord Briarwood, and Lady Briarwood.  Each Percival de Rolo: Manifestation of the List Fine Art Print features an authorized, automated artist signature and an embossed Seal of Authenticity as a part of the Critical Role collection from Sideshow. Available unframed and in a custom framed presentation, this portentous portrait is a must-have for any Critter's Vox Machina display.  Make a pact and add the Percival de Rolo: Manifestation of the List Fine Art Print by Livia Prima to your Critical Role artwork collection today!
nodes.name: Percival de Rolo: Manifestation of the List

nodes.description: Sideshow and Iron Studios are proud to announce the latest from the Battle Diorama Series Art Scale 1:10 line - Casey Jones!   From Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles, this Casey Jones Art Scale Statue is limited edition, highly detailed, and hand-painted.  TMNT fans, don't miss your chance to add the Casey Jones statue to your Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles collectibles display!

nodes.description: Batman: The Killing Joke was released in 1988 as a particularly special piece among the one-shot graphic novels. This epic work had a tremendous impact on the films and comic books that succeeded it, and it is indeed the third time Kotobukiya is releasing a statue from it.  One day, having lost all emotional support, a Red Hood Gang member is being hunted down by Batman. Cornered with nowhere to run, the man jumps into a river in a frantic attempt to escape. However, chemicals in the water from the Ace Chemical Processing Plant bleach his skin white, his hair bright green, and his lips red. Seeing his reflection in the water, the man stumbles to his feet and lets out an endless howling laugh, thus transforming into a madman.  Kotobukiya worked hard on bringing this whole unforgettable sequence to life. From the worst of his many terrible tragedies, The Joker from his 'one bad day' has been vibrantly reimagined into a statue.  The coloring was done based on the 20th-anniversary monochrome version of the graphic novel, which featured recoloring by the artist himself. This statue includes a special base and can be displayed straight out of the package.
nodes.name: The Joker One Bad Day

nodes.description: Attention Space Ranger Recruits! Sideshow and Super 7 present the new Sox Vinyl Collectible! Sox the cat is Buzz Lightyear's PCR (Personal Companion Robot) and now he can be your pal too!  From Disney and Pixar's Lightyear, this premium vinyl figure is engineered to be truly life-sized and measures about 20 long from nose to tail, and almost 15 tall to the tip of his ears. Fully poseable and wearing a faux leather collar with real metal name tag, Sox is accompanied by his small mouse protocol robot with a glow-in-the-dark tail.  This limited edition premium collectible comes packaged in a Property of Star Command cat carrier to display with the rest of your Disney collection!
nodes.name: Sox

nodes.description: Sideshow and Iron Studios are proud to announce the latest from the Battle Diorama Series Art Scale 1:10 line - Shang-Chi & Morris!  From Shang-Chi and the Legend of the Ten Rings, this Shang-Chi & Morris Art Scale Statue is limited edition, highly detailed, and hand-painted.  Shang-Chi fans, don't miss your chance to add the Shang-Chi & Morris statue to your Marvel collectibles display!
nodes.name: Shang-Chi & Morris

nodes.description: The team at its best. It's just like old times.   Sideshow Art Prints and Brian Rood Art present The Awakening Fine Art Print, based on the live-action adaptation of The Umbrella Academy.  Inspired by the premiere season of this hit streaming series, The Awakening shows the fractured super hero family under the proud, monocled gaze of patriarch Sir Reginald Hargreeves. Under his tutelage, the six notably powerful siblings Luther, Diego, Allison, Klaus, Five, and Ben became a team of crimefighters in the public eye. Artist Brian Rood's colorful collage of characters and numbers surrounds the Umbrella Academy's official seal, alongside other allies and antagonists like Pogo the chimp, Mom the robot, and time-traveling hitmen Hazel and Cha-Cha.  Each The Awakening Fine Art Print is hand-signed by artist Brian Rood as a part of the limited edition of 250 pieces. This quirky super hero artwork is a must-have for fans of The Umbrella Academy.   It's not the end of the world if you don't add this Umbrella Academy art to your collection — oh wait, it actually might be! Avert the apocalypse and bring home The Awakening Fine Art Print by Brian Rood today.
nodes.name: The Awakening

nodes.description: Sideshow and Iron Studios are proud to announce the latest from the Battle Diorama Series Art Scale 1:10 line - Wenwu!  From Shang-Chi and the Legend of the Ten Rings, this Wenwu Art Scale Statue is limited edition, highly detailed, and hand-painted.  Shang-Chi fans, don't miss your chance to add the Wenwu statue to your Marvel collectibles display!
nodes.name: Wenwu

nodes.description: From the anime film series Evangelion: New Theatrical Edition, threezero is excited to present the ROBO-DOU Evangelion Production Model-03 Collectible Figure!  This non-scale articulated figure stands approximately 25cm (9.8 ) tall with a remarkable die-cast main frame that provides 48 points of articulation. The figure is constructed of ABS, PVC, POM, and zinc alloy. Threezero's renown paint application techniques highlight all the details.  The ROBO-DOU Evangelion Production Model-03 action figure includes many interactive features to increase playability. To replicate the form when Production Model-03 was infected by the 9th Angel, the figure includes a pair of extended arms to replace the standard arms, and infected arms to replace the shoulder restraints. The Entry Plug hatch on the back of the figure can be opened to reveal the Entry Plug inside and includes two Entry Plug accessories to attach; a short Entry Plug for inserted mode, and a long Entry Plug for extracted mode. In addition, the figure includes a destroyed Entry Plug and an infection effect piece which can be combined with the long Entry Plug. The destroyed Entry Plug can also be combined with ROBO-DOU Evangelion Test Type-01 (sold separately), to replicate the scene where the Entry Plug is crushed by the jaws of Evangelion Test Type-01. The figure also includes an Umbilical Cable which can be attached to the socket at the back of the figure, a variety of interchangeable hands in different poses, and a ROBO-DOU action stand.
nodes.name: ROBO-DOU Evangelion Production Model-03

nodes.description: After all these years, this part never gets old.   Sideshow and Premium Collectibles Studio present the Captain America 1:6 Scale Statue, a dynamic Marvel collectible ready to fight his way to your shelf.  The fully sculpted Captain America Statue measures 15 tall as the Star-Spangled Avenger, clad in his signature red, white, and blue attire, defends a city from a horde of evil robots. Using his circular shield, Steve Rogers delivers a crushing blow to his enemy while standing on a pile of defeated drones. From his determined expression to his strong stance over that metallic rubble, Captain America proves he is undoubtedly one of Earth's Mightiest Heroes.  Inspired by Captain America's appearance in the open-world action RPG MARVEL Future Revolution, this video game collectible is perfect for fans of Marvel gaming. Collect this statue alongside other Marvel collectible figures by Premium Collectibles Studio to assemble the ultimate superhero display.  Defend your collection when you bring home the Captain America 1:6 Scale Statue by Premium Collectibles Studio today!
nodes.name: Captain America

nodes.description: The Quest for The Ring Awaits You! First THE LORD OF THE RINGS™ Poster Coin.  We are thrilled to reveal the first poster coin for THE LORD OF THE RINGS™! Of course, we start with the first film in the epic fantasy trilogy, The Fellowship of the Ring.   This treasure from Middle Earth is made from 1oz of pure silver and is crafted to replicate the film's poster. It showcases a frosted image of the Pillars of Kings, which creates a stunning contrast against the colored landscape. Detailed engravings and a mirror finish surrounding the image adds extra charm to this beautiful design. The obverse is lightly frosted and includes the Ian Rank Broadley effigy of Queen Elizabeth II, confirming the coin as legal tender.   Created in partnership with Warner Bros. Consumer Products, the coin is secured in an acrylic capsule, nestled in blue velvet, and arrives in a custom-designed box with a large window for display. Printed on the box, you will find a Certificate of Authenticity and the unique number for the coin in the limited mintage of just 3,000.   This piece is sure to drive excitement for all LOTR fans, so don't delay. Order now!
nodes.name: The Lord of the Rings: The Fellowship of the Ring Movie Poster 1oz Silver Coin

nodes.description: See Darth Vader™ as a sensational silver miniature designed by 3D master sculptor Alejandro Pereira Ezcurra. Fans will recognize this menacing stance, showing the Sith Lord™ using the Force™ choke!  Guaranteed minimum 150g pure silver, this is a very limited-edition piece - only 1,000 casts will be made.  This powerful figurine stands approx. 9cm tall and will arrive inside a substantial Star Wars™ themed case.   Feel the power of the Force and order now!
nodes.name: Darth Vader Silver Miniature

nodes.description: To Infinity. – Buzz Lightyear  The long-awaited movie Lightyear has finally arrived! Disney and Pixar's new animated sci-fi action-adventure reveals the origin story of Buzz Lightyear – the hero who inspired the toy action figure – introducing the legendary space ranger who would win generations of fans. As Buzz tries to find a way back home through space and time, he's joined by a group of ambitious recruits and his charming robot companion cat, Sox.  To join the Star Commander on the galactic adventure, Sideshow and Hot Toys are presenting Space Ranger Alpha Buzz Lightyear as the sixth scale collectible figure from Lightyear.  Meticulously crafted based on the appearance of Buzz Lightyear from the animation, the greatly detailed Disney collectible figure features a newly developed head sculpt with separate rolling eyeballs features, a beautiful recreation of the space ranger suit and badges with multiple layers of weathering effects, highly accurate weapons including laser gun, blade, blaster cannon, a pair of handcuffs and a dynamic figure stand.  The deluxe version exclusively includes Buzz's new companion Sox the robotic cat, Sox's computer, also the iconic wing pack and two styles of wings painted with metallic accent.  Together with the Buzz Lightyear figure, you can go to infinity and beyond!
nodes.name: Space Ranger Alpha Buzz Lightyear (Deluxe Version)

nodes.description: ' I am no longer Borg, but the prospect of becoming human is... unsettling. I don't know where I belong.'  She belongs in your collection of museum-grade collectible Star Trek figures! EXO-6's next release from Star Trek: Voyager is former Borg drone Seven of Nine, Tertiary Adjunct of Unimatrix 01; a human previously known as Annika Hansen until she was assimilated by the Borg Collective at the age of 6.  Seven of Nine became a foil for Captain Janeway, providing an alien perspective on the human condition, much like Spock or Data in previous Star Trek incarnations. Just like those characters, Seven became hugely popular, no doubt due in some part to the casting of Jeri Ryan as the naïve but alluring cyborg.  Seven went from trying to assimilate the crew, to becoming a member of the crew and was instrumental in helping find a way back to Earth.  This sixth-scale figure re-creates this iconic character in exquisite sixth-scale detail. Standing approximately 11.5 inches tall, every element, from her purple catsuit and matching holsters for phaser and tricorder to the Borg implants, is authentically reproduced. The original portrait sculpt of Jeri Ryan has an authentic, hand-painted likeness.  Seven of Nine is the first use of the originally designed EXO-6 female body, specifically created for this character. This perfectly proportioned articulated body has been 3 years in the making. Don't miss your chance to add her to your Star Trek to your collection today!
nodes.name: Seven of Nine

nodes.description: Sideshow is excited to present this Star Wars™ deluxe sculptural magnet is the final in the first wave of Regal Robot's Separation Collection, a series that captures great moments from the classic films we love. This magnetic mini sculpture is based on Darth Vader's™ Hand from Star Wars: Return of the Jedi™, straight out of the climactic moments of the original trilogy!  Like the others in this series, these were designed, prototyped and produced in the USA, each magnet is hand-cast in solid resin and hand-painted by the FX artists in our New York studio with distinctive faux finishes. They ship ready to display.  Add this great new magnet to your collection, home, office, man-cave or fridge!
nodes.name: Darth Vader™ Hand Magnet

nodes.description: Sideshow and Grey Matter Art are proud to present The Amazing Spider-Man #800 (Variant Edition) Fine Art Print!  This variant cover art for the astounding 800th issue of The Amazing Spider-Man sees our hero appearing almost specter-like in a beautifully dark vision from legendary artist Moebius (Jean Giraud).  Limited to 125 pieces, this print is hand-numbered and printed by Grey Matter Printing.  Marvel fans, be sure to add this spectacular Spider-Man artwork to your collection today!
nodes.name: The Amazing Spider-Man #800 (Variant Edition)

nodes.description: Sideshow and Grey Matter Art are thrilled to bring you the Wolverine #1 (Variant Edition) Fine Art Print!  Created as variant cover art for Wolverine #1 by the acclaimed comic artist Jeehyung Lee, this print features Wolverine fearlessly squared to attack the most infamous of X-Men antagonists, the Sentinels. With claws captured so brilliantly you can almost hear the SNIKT echo from the print, this comic artwork is sure to make an exciting addition to any collection.  You picked the RIGHT house, Bub! Limited to 125 pieces, be sure to add Wolverine to your Marvel art gallery today!
nodes.name: Wolverine #1 (Variant Edition)

nodes.description: Sideshow and Grey Matter Art are proud to present the Wolverine Returns #2 (Variant Edition) Fine Art Print!  Created in an otherwordly style by the legendary Moebius (Jean Giraud) as variant cover art for Return of Wolverine #2, this thoughtfully subdued Wolverine artwork is limited to 125 pieces and is printed by Grey Matter Printing.  It's an art and comic lover's delight! Indulge in the fantasy-esque world of Moebius and celebrate an iconic Marvel superhero by adding this Wolverine print to your collection today!
nodes.name: Wolverine Returns #2 (Variant Edition)

nodes.description: Sideshow and TBLeague are proud to present this amazing collectible, the XiaoBai-Blanca Sixth Scale Collectible based on one of the standout characters from the 2019 animated Chinese film White Snake and its sequel Green Snake. This mischievous and mysterious character- even lacking an official name beyond her job title and species!- is nevertheless a fan favorite based on her personality, design, and role within the series of movies.  This sixth scale figure stands approximately 11.41 inches tall and comes with a variety of accessories based on her appearance in the movie. Order today to add to your collection!
nodes.name: White Snake - XiaoBai-Blanca

nodes.description: Sideshow and Kotobukiya introduce the from the hit platform battle royale video game Fall Guys, the Fall Guys Pack Legendary Edition: Orangeade & Golden Chicken Costume Action Figure!  The Legendary Edition features the Golden Chicken costume — proof that one is truly the champion of bumbling champions.  The Fall Guys can wear the costumes by simply putting them over their upper body parts and replacing their lower body parts. The arms can be interchanged to recreate a range of poses, such as running or taunting. Not only that, there are three colors of face parts plus 'Hearts' and 'Lightning' stickers.  In addition, the Fall Guys in this pack are compatible with others in the series, so you can customize your own beans just like in the game. Every Fall Guy in the series also comes with a stand, props, and a crown. Make your desk a new stage for this unexpectedly massive line up!
nodes.name: Fall Guys Pack Legendary Edition: Orangeade & Golden Chicken Costume

nodes.description: Sideshow and Kotobukiya introduce from the hit platform battle royale video game Fall Guys, the Fall Guys Pack 01: Movie Star & Chicken Costume Action Figure!  Pack 01 features the Movie Star starter color and the iconic Chicken costume from Season 1.  The Fall Guys can wear the costumes by simply putting them over their upper body parts and replacing their lower body parts. The arms can be interchanged to recreate a range of poses, such as running or taunting. Not only that, there are three colors of face parts plus 'Hearts' and 'Lightning' stickers.  In addition, the Fall Guys in this pack are compatible with others in the series, so you can customize your own beans just like in the game. Every Fall Guy in the series also comes with a stand, props, and a crown. Make your desk a new stage for this unexpectedly massive line up!

Pack 03 features the Mint Chocolate starter color and the iconic Hot Dog custome from Season 1.  The Fall Guys can wear the costumes by simply putting them over their upper body parts and replacing their lower body parts. The arms can be interchanged to recreate a range of poses, such as running or taunting. Not only that, there are three colors of face parts plus 'Hearts' and 'Lightning' stickers. nodes.description: 'I'm breaking the laws of nature. I know.'  Sideshow and Grey Matter Art are thrilled to present the stunning and otherwordly Doctor Strange (Foil Edition) Fine Art Screen Print by acclaimed artist and illustrator Juan Ramos!  In 2016's Doctor Strange, the impossibilities are endless. Paying tribute to the journey of Dr. Stephen Strange as he becomes a master of the mystic arts, this foil edition screen print takes us on our own journey through its gorgeously supernatural presentation of color.   This screen print is hand-numbered and limited to 225 pieces.   Head into interstellar overdrive with this mystical Doctor Strange artwork and bring some magic to your Marvel art print collection today!
nodes.name: Doctor Strange (Foil Edition)

nodes.description: Sideshow and Joytoy proudly present the Ultramarines Outriders Brother Catonus 1:18 Scale Collectible Figure!  The most elite of the Space Marine Chapters in the Imperium of Man, the Ultramarines from Warhammer 40k comes to life with this new series of 1:18 scale figures. Outrider Squads rove in advance of the main Space Marine lines, guarding flanks of larger formations or hunting down enemy infiltrators.  Don't miss your chance to add this figure to your Warhammer 40k collection today!
nodes.name: Ultramarines Outriders Brother Catonus

nodes.description: Sideshow and Joytoy are excited to present the Ragnar Blackmane 1:18 Scale Collectible Figure!  Supremely confident and eager to always be first into the fray, Wolf Lord Ragnar Blackmane leads his Great Company in devastating planetary invasions. No longer as headstrong as in his youth, Ragnar's berserk rages are still furious hurricanes of violence, and his terrifying howls freeze the blood of his foes.  This fully articulated 1:18 scale Ragnar Blackmane figure includes interchangeable hands and weapon accessories and stands about 5' tall.  Don't miss your chance to add this figure to your Warhammer 40k video game collection today!
nodes.name: Ragnar Blackmane

nodes.description: Sideshow and Joytoy proudly present the Black Templars Outriders Brother Valtus 1:18 Scale Collectible Figure!  Outrider Squads rove in advance of the main lines, guarding flanks of larger formations or hunting down enemy infiltrators. This Brother Valtus figure stands at 5.35' tall includes interchangable hands and weapon accessories.   Don't miss your chance to add him to your Warhammer 40k collection today!
nodes.name: Black Templars Outriders Brother Valtus

nodes.description: Sideshow and Joytoy are proud to present Bjorn the Fell-Handed 1:18 Scale Collectible Figure!  Interred in a custom-built Dreadnought, Bjorn is a legendary figure amongst the Space Wolves, for he fought in the Horus Heresy amongst the retinue of Leman Russ himself. Bjorn the Fell-Handed is the oldest warrior in the Imperium, serving first as a warrior, then as Wolf Lord, and finally a Dreadnought, to this day he is the spiritual and moral compass for the entire Chapter.   This 1:18 scale fully articulated figure stands approximately 7.6' tall. Don't miss your chance to add this figure to your Warhammer 40k collection today!
nodes.name: Bjorn the Fell-Handed

nodes.description: Sideshow and TBLeague are proud to present this amazing collectible, the Xiaoqing-Verta Sixth Scale Collectible based on one of the standout characters from the 2019 animated Chinese film White Snake and its sequel Green Snake. This character is a fan favorite based on her personality, design, and role within the series of movies.  This sixth scale figure stands approximately 11.41 inches tall and comes with a variety of accessories based on her appearance in the movie. Order today to add to your collection!
nodes.name: Green Snake - Xiaoqing-Verta

nodes.description: Sideshow and Joytoy proudly present the Ultramarines Outriders Bike Collectible Figure!  The most elite of the Space Marine Chapters in the Imperium of Man, the Ultramarines from Warhammer 40k comes to life with this new series of 1:18 scale figures and accessories. Outrider Squads rove in advance of the main Space Marine lines, guarding flanks of larger formations or hunting down enemy infiltrators.   This Ultramarines Outrider Bike is a great addition to any Ultramarines figure (sold separately). Don't miss your chance to add it to your collection today!
nodes.name: Ultramarines Outriders Bike

nodes.description: Sideshow and Joytoy proudly present the Black Templars Outriders Bike Collectible Figure!  Outrider Squads rove in advance of the main lines, guarding flanks of larger formations or hunting down enemy infiltrators. This Black Templar Outrider Bike is a great addition to any Ultramarines figure (sold separately).  Don't miss your chance to add this to your Warhammer 40k collection today!
nodes.name: Black Templars Outriders Bike

nodes.description: Beast Kingdom's highly articulable DAH (Dynamic 8action Heroes) figure range is ready to take you 'To Infinity and Beyond' with the release of the Buzz Lightyear DAH-076 figure!  Following the more realistic take on Buzz, the DAH features 20 points of articulation and two highly detailed head sculpts to match. The detailed 'Alpha' armor suit features the detailed emblems and color schemes from the movie. The DAH set also includes an arm-mountable laser gun and a set of four replaceable pairs of hands to really get Buzz's salutes on point! The built LED lights also give fans ample ways to show off the chest indicators for the ultimate effect. Not forgetting the robotic cat Sox and a cat carrier are also both featured in the set.  A fantastic set for fans of Pixar's most famous Space Trooper!
nodes.name: Buzz Lightyear Alpha Suit

nodes.description: The Owner of Precious Jade appears in the movie White Snake as the owner of a magic shop. A fox demon in the form of a young woman, she has two faces- a human face in front, and a fox face on the back of her head. She possesses the ability to turn her head 180 degrees around and speak with her fox face, which changes her voice to sound much deeper and older.  Sideshow and TBLeague are proud to present this amazing collectible, the Owner of Precious Jade - Fox Demon Sixth Scale Collectible based on one of the standout characters from the 2019 animated Chinese film White Snake and its sequel Green Snake. This mischievous and mysterious character- even lacking an official name beyond her job title and species!- is nevertheless a fan favorite based on her personality, design, and role within the series of movies.  This sixth scale figure stands approximately 8.66 inches tall and comes with a variety of accessories based on her appearance in White Snake. Order today to add to your collection!
nodes.name: White Snake - Owner of Precious Jade - Fox Demon

nodes.description: Sideshow and Kotobukiya are proud to present the Toge Inumaki ARTFX J scale statue from the TV anime, JUJUTSU KAISEN!  He comes to life in a battle-ready stance. Extra attention was paid to faithfully recreating even his smallest details, such as the texture of his hair and features of his hands. His neck warmer and right arm can be swapped out to pose him with the zipper open.  The design of the base uses the character's signature colors to recreate the atmosphere of the series.
nodes.name: Toge Inumaki

nodes.description: Coal, the ubiquitous fuel of the Industrial Revolution, powered everything from foundries, locomotives and steamships of the new age, to the stoves, heaters and irons of domestic mundanity. Resembling the lustre of anthracite, a glimmering dark finish envelops the Special Edition 400% Coal Black Steampunk BE@RBRICK ROYAL SELANGOR, against which inner workings of gauges and conduits in bright pewter are revealed in sharp contrast.  Since first appearing in Tokyo in 2001, the BE@RBRICK, a cartoon-like figure of a bear, has acquired international cult status. Released by MEDICOM TOY in a variety of materials and sizes, and with contributions from a host of international collaborators, the figure embodies the intersection of contemporary notions of art, style, design and fashion.
nodes.name: Be@rbrick Royal Selangor Steampunk Coal Black 400％

nodes.description: The Owner of Precious Jade appears in the movie White Snake 2: The Tribulation of the Green Snake (or just shortened to Green Snake)as the owner of a magic shop. A fox demon in the form of a young woman, she has two faces- a human face in front, and a fox face on the back of her head. She possesses the ability to turn her head 180 degrees around and speak with her fox face, which changes her voice to sound much deeper and older.  Sideshow and TBLeague are proud to present this amazing collectible, the Owner of Precious Jade - Fox Demon Sixth Scale Collectible based on one of the standout characters from the 2019 animated Chinese film White Snake and its sequel Green Snake. This mischievous and mysterious character- even lacking an official name beyond her job title and species!- is nevertheless a fan favorite based on her personality, design, and role within the series of movies.  This sixth scale figure stands approximately 8.66 inches tall and comes with a variety of accessories based on her appearance in White Snake. Order today to add to your collection!
nodes.name: Green Snake - Owner of Precious Jade - Fox Demon

nodes.description: The all-knowing and all-seeing Three Eyed Raven features on the second medallion in the Game of Thrones™ Collection! An ancient and immensely powerful being, the Three Eyed Raven could perceive the past, present and future through visions and time travel with ease.   Created in partnership with Warner Bros. Consumer Products, this 1oz silver medallion is shaped as a square badge. On one side, there is the engraving of the mysterious being in his raven form. The other side includes the engraved words All men must die and the Game of Thrones logo. Further engraving along the bottom confirms the medallion as a full 1oz of .999 fine silver and includes the HBO copyright for authentication.   The medallion arrives nestled in black velvet that is placed inside a custom-designed box to complement this special collectible.   Be the envy of all Game of Thrones fans with this unique collectible. Order today!
nodes.name: Three Eyed Raven 1oz Silver Medallion

nodes.description: Consider this my final lesson. Look out for yourself. Anything else is weakness. – Cad Bane   A ruthless bounty hunter from the planet Duro™, Cad Bane was the preeminent blaster-for-hire in the galaxy at the time of the Clone Wars™ and after the conflict ended. Using an impressive arsenal of weapons, the cold, cruel, and calculating Bane would literally track his prey to the ends of the galaxy if required.   Following his first live-action appearance in The Book of Boba Fett, Sideshow and Hot Toys are excited to present the deadly mercenary in the Cad Bane (Deluxe Version) Sixth Scale Figure!   This Star Wars collectible figure features a newly developed head sculpt with amazing likeness, skillfully tailored hat and outfit, wired long coat, a pair of blaster pistols, a flamethrower effect, and a display base.  This Deluxe Version of the Cad Bane figure exclusively includes a pair of rocket thrusters for Cad Bane's boots, and the bounty hunter's techno-service droid Todo 360™ as seen in the Star Wars: The Clone Wars™ animated series.   Now it's a great time to have this infamous bounty hunter in your Star Wars collection!
nodes.name: Cad Bane (Deluxe Version)

nodes.description: Having survived the Sarlacc™ pit on Tatooine™, Boba Fett reclaimed his armor and took over the throne at Jabba's Palace™. No longer just a hired gun, he reinvents himself on Tatooine alongside Fennec Shand™ to be a respected leader to the people of Mos Espa™.   Sideshow and Hot Toys are delighted to officially introduce the new detailed Boba Fett Sixth Scale Figure from the live-action series!  This Star Wars collectible figure features a newly developed Boba Fett helmet and armor, finely tailored under-suit, a jetpack, a blaster pistol, a blaster rifle, a gaffi stick, and a sand-themed figure base!   Face off with the stranger from the desert with this new Boba Fett collectible figure!
nodes.name: Boba Fett

nodes.description: Spider-Man from Marvel Comics is officially celebrating its 60th anniversary of web-slinging fun! Join Beast Kingdom and celebrate the monumental milestone with the release of the MEA-037 bright box series!  This collection of six fun designs and unique Spider-Man characters combine to create an impressive tower of Spidey fun. Each product can be combined together to create the Spider-Man high-rise building design. Make sure to collect all six to be in with a chance of getting the seventh special edition character!
nodes.name: Spider-Man 60th Anniversary

nodes.description: Joining the STATIC ARTS collection is the main character from FINAL FANTASY VII REMAKE, Cloud Strife!  Cloud's dignified expression has been captured, and his hair has been sculpted with attention to detail down to the tips. The materia embedded in the Buster Sword has also been faithfully reproduced.  The figure strikes a powerful pose, while carrying a Buster Sword in one hand. The details of his muscular upper arms and the fine wrinkles in his trousers are also a true highlight of the figure, which could only be created with STATIC ARTS.
nodes.name: Cloud Strife

nodes.description: Sideshow and Sqare Enix present the Roche and Motorcycle Set! This motorcycle and speed-loving, rebellious 3-C SOLDIER operator from FINAL FANTASY VII REMAKE joins the PLAY ARTS KAI lineup!  He makes his first appearance in the remake as Cloud's new rival, with his distinctive hairstyle and belligerent expression, which can be seen in this figure. The costume is detailed down to the shoulder armor, the wrinkles on the rider jacket, the pouch on his leg, and belt on his waist, while also ensuring mobility.  Included with the figure are hand parts for various expressions, an interchangeable face for 3-C SOLDIER operator, and a sword that can be mounted on his back or held in his hand, allowing for various scenes from the game to be recreated.  The motorcycle included as part of the set features a streamlined shape, a red body exclusive to Roche, and details around the exhaust and engine. The included stand can also be used to recreate the impressive wheelie pose from the game.
nodes.name: Roche and Motorcycle Set

nodes.description: Made predominantly of porcelain and boasting an accurate likeness to Rob Bowyer's artwork 'Kill Them All' comes The Phantom Knight (Hell Chamber).  The Phantom Knight (Hell Chamber) is a piece of functional art. Featuring high gloss painted porcelain, the incense chamber has a weathered grey palette and features a removable base for easy cleaning.  Artfully placed openings allow smoke to rise out of the brawny silhouette, accentuating the ethereal look and feel of The Phantom Knight (Hell Chamber).
nodes.name: The Phantom Knight (Hell Chamber)

nodes.description: Sideshow and Square Enix present the Shinra Security Officer from FINAL FANTASY VII REMAKE, a supporting character who repeatedly gets in the way of Cloud and his friends, is joining the PLAY ARTS KAI lineup!  Each detail; from the rather eerie look enhanced by the Shinra regulation three-scope helmet, to the texture on their jacket, scarf, and armor on their shoulders and knees; represents the finely rendered security officer uniform depicted throughout the series.  The figure comes with a variety of interchangeable hand pieces, including a grenade-carrying hand, a tonfa that can be held in the dedicated hand or mounted against the thigh, a machine gun, a shotgun, a stun baton, and various other weapons, allowing you to recreate various battle scenes from the game.
nodes.name: Shinra Security Officer

nodes.description: Sideshow and Square Enix present the Shinra Elite Security Officer and Motorcyle Set from FINAL FANTASY VII REMAKE joins the PLAY ARTS KAI line up!  The coloring of the uniform, goggles, helmet, shoulder armor, and shoe belts are all expressed in detail to show the difference in rank from the general security officers.  Various interchangeable hand parts, including the hand holding the grenade, a tonfa that can be held in the dedicated hand or equipped against the thigh, machine gun, shotgun, stun baton, and various weapons are included as accessories, allowing various battle scenes in the game to be reproduced.   The motorcycle that accompanies the set also features a streamlined shape, a body with the SHINRA name engraved on it, a green-based color scheme, and details around the muffler and engine.
nodes.name: Shinra Elite Security Officer and Motorcycle Set

nodes.description: Sideshow and Square Enix present the motorcycle and speed-loving, rebellious 3-C SOLDIER operator, Roche from FINAL FANTASY VII REMAKE joins the PLAY ARTS KAI lineup!  He makes his first appearance in the remake as Cloud's new rival, with his distinctive hairstyle and belligerent expression, which can be seen in this figure. The costume is detailed down to the shoulder armor, the wrinkles on the rider jacket, the pouch on his leg, and belt on his waist, while also ensuring mobility.  Included with the figure are hand parts for various expressions, an interchangeable face for 3-C SOLDIER operator, and a sword that can be mounted on his back or held in his hand, allowing for various scenes from the game to be recreated.
nodes.name: Roche

nodes.description: The fourth release in The Mandalorian™ Classic Coin Collection features the legendary Mandalorian warrior, Bo-Katan Kryze™.  Officially licensed, these splendid coins are finely engraved and showcase Bo-Katan™ in her Mandalorian™ armor against the deck of Imperial Freighter™ in the background. As legal tender coins, the obverse simply bears the Ian Rank-Broadley effigy of Her Majesty Queen Elizabeth II and a Certificate of Authenticity sits within the coin case.   All the coins arrive in a high-quality case placed inside a Star Wars™ themed box. Inside, you will find the coin's unique number in the mintage — just 5000 coins for the 1oz silver!   Don't miss out on the opportunity to grab one of these unique collectibles. Order today!
nodes.name: Bo-Katan Kryze 1oz Silver Coin

nodes.description: The fourth release in The Mandalorian™ Classic Coin Collection features the legendary Mandalorian warrior, Bo-Katan Kryze™.  Officially licensed, these splendid coins are finely engraved and showcase Bo-Katan™ in her Mandalorian™ armor against the deck of Imperial Freighter™ in the background. As legal tender coins, the obverse simply bears the Ian Rank-Broadley effigy of Her Majesty Queen Elizabeth II and a Certificate of Authenticity sits within the coin case.   All the coins arrive in a high-quality case placed inside a Star Wars™ themed box. Inside, you will find the coin's unique number in the mintage — just 500 coins for the 1/4oz gold!   Don't miss out on the opportunity to grab one of these unique collectibles. Order today!
nodes.name: Bo-Katan Kryze ¼oz Gold Coin

nodes.description: Sideshow Art Prints presents the Nosferatu Skateboard Deck, featuring the horror illustration work of artist Timothy Pittides.  Inspired by the classic silent film Nosferatu, eine Symphonie des Grauens, Timothy Pittides' vision of the vampiric Count Orlok is a horrific sight to behold! In the artist's own tribute to the iconic work, the dreaded creature peers from the broken boards of his coffin as rats crawl around its surface. His piercing gaze and equally piercing fangs mesmerize and menace the viewer in this detailed black and white design.  Each Nosferatu Skateboard Deck is resin printed on a 7-ply Canadian Maple Street Deck measuring 8.25 wide and 32.5 long. Limited to a numbered edition of only 100 pieces ever produced, this enthralling board makes a unique, durable addition to your collection, suited for both practical use on the ramp and for proudly displaying on your wall.  Bring the horror home and add the Nosferatu Skateboard Deck by Timothy Pittides to your collection today!  Skate Deck details:   Original Art by Timothy Pittides Limited edition of 100 8.25 x 32.5 Street Deck Resin Print on 7-Ply Canadian Maple
nodes.name: Nosferatu

nodes.description: Sideshow Art Prints presents the Vices: Gossip Skateboard Deck, featuring the original illustration work of artist Timothy Pittides.  Loose lips sink ships — and now they sting! Timothy Pittides' original Vices series represents our darkest desires and addictions through the lens of 1920s-inspired noir and Art Deco imagery. Venomous words take the form of a scorpion in this macabre piece inspired by malicious whispers and idle talk. Vices: Gossip warns of the danger of speaking wantonly in the company of others, because the things you say might just come back to bite you.  Each Vices: Gossip Skateboard Deck is resin printed on a 7-ply Canadian Maple Street Deck measuring 8.25 wide and 32.5 long. Limited to a numbered edition of only 100 pieces ever produced, this mesmerizing board makes a striking and durable addition to your collection, suited for both practical use on the ramp and for proudly displaying on your wall.  Give in to the temptation and add the Vices: Gossip Skateboard Deck by Timothy Pittides to your collection today.  Skate Deck details:   Original Art by Timothy Pittides Limited edition of 100 8.25 x 32.5 Street Deck Resin Print on 7-Ply Canadian Maple
nodes.name: Vices: Gossip

nodes.description: That bat they shine in the sky … civilians think it's a call for help. The bad guys think it's a warning.   Sideshow Art Prints and Alex Ross Art present the Batwoman Fine Art Lithograph, a dramatic DC Comics art print for fans of the Bat-Family.  Gotham City criminals have a new face to fear with Batwoman on the case! In a flash of red, Kate Kane descends from the rooftops, ready to face crime with her own tactical brand of justice. Batwoman uses her supernatural appearance to spread superstition through Gotham's underworld, working from the shadows like her cousin Bruce Wayne. Alex Ross captures this striking crimefighting persona as her cape cuts sharply through the gloom to confront the real darkness in her city.   Originally created as a variant cover for Detective Comics #860 (2009), written by Greg Rucka for DC Comics, this comic book collectible is now being offered for fans in a fine art format. Each Batwoman Fine Art Lithograph is hand-signed by Alex Ross and includes a Certificate of Authenticity as a part of the limited edition of only 150 pieces. Available unframed or in a custom framed presentation, this super hero wall art makes a perfect cousin to any Batman artwork collection.  Take wing with Kate Kane and bring home the Batwoman Fine Art Lithograph by Alex Ross today!
nodes.name: Batwoman

nodes.description: Sideshow Art Prints and Ozone Productions present the Joséphine Baker: Folies Bergère Fine Art Print by renowned pinup artist Olivia De Berardinis.  Josephine Baker has been one of Olivia's biggest artistic inspirations for over 30 years, but the beloved entertainer and activist has a global legacy over a century long! Lively and sensational, this star of the Folies Bergère shines in a dazzling original work that shows her dancing in a yellow feathered costume. The image is packed with vibrant motion, as detailed brush strokes show Baker's enchanting movements against the black background. From her charming smile to her expressive performance, it's not hard to see why Baker became one of the most celebrated headliners of the famed music hall and a symbol of the Roaring Twenties.  Each officially licensed Joséphine Baker: Folies Bergère Fine Art Print is hand-signed by Olivia herself and includes her official embossed Seal of Authenticity along with a signed Certificate of Authenticity as a part of the limited edition of only 150 pieces. This faithful reproduction of Olivia's original acrylic on wood painting is available to pinup art collectors as an unframed giclée with hand-torn edges or in a custom framed format, making this a must-have tribute to an international icon of the Jazz Age.  Bring the cabaret home to your collection with the Joséphine Baker: Folies Bergère Fine Art Print by Olivia De Berardinis!
nodes.name: Joséphine Baker: Folies Bergère

nodes.description: Sideshow and Manas SUM are excited to present the Chick & Flying Sunfish Statue!  This statue is hand-painted on resin and stands approximately 11' tall. This Michihiro Matsuoka x Manas S+U+M statue is limited to 300 pieces worldwide so don't miss your chance to add this statue to your collection today!
nodes.name: Chick & Flying Sunfish

nodes.description: Sideshow and Manas SUM are excited to present the Flying Western Corgi Statue!  Standing at 11' tall this hand-painted resin statue features one of the world's most adorable creatures - a corgi! Not your ordinary dog, this courageous corgi is ready to fly and explore the world by air.  With only 200 pieces made, don't miss your chance to add this statue to your collection today!
nodes.name: Flying Western Corgi

nodes.description: Sideshow and ACME Archives are thrilled to present the Back Together Again Fine Art Print!  The gang's all here! This stunning Black Widow-inspired superhero print by Claudio Aboy includes a certificate of authenticity and the artist's authorized signature. Limited to only 150 pieces, you don't want to miss out on this!  Marvel fans! Be sure to add this awesome Black Widow art print to your Marvel art collection today!
nodes.name: Back Together Again

nodes.description: Being Silk … it's who I am. It's what makes me happy. My purpose. My present. My future.   Sideshow presents the Silk #5 Fine Art Print, a captivating Marvel art print by Felipe Massafera.  The Silk #5 Fine Art Print shows the spider-hero Silk in her signature red, black, and white costume. Cindy Moon is spinning an intricately layered web above a dark sky. Red and green smoke billows around her as she balances delicately in the center of her tangled threads, with Spider-Man bound below by layers of silken string.  Originally created as a variant cover for Silk #5 (2021), this comic book collectible is now available to fans in a fine art format. Each Silk #5 Fine Art Print features an authorized, automated artist signature and an embossed Sideshow logo as part of the limited edition of 300 pieces. Available as an unframed, certified archival fine art print or in a custom framed presentation, this Marvel wall art makes a sensational addition to any collection.  Get caught in her web when you add the Silk #5 Fine Art Print by Felipe Massafera to your Spider-Man art collection today!
nodes.name: Silk #5

nodes.description: Sideshow and ACME Archives are thrilled to present The Dark Duel Fine Art Lithograph!  This Star Wars: The Clone Wars-inspired artwork by Laz Marquez features Darth Maul and Ahsoka Tano in a stunning presentation of the duality of the Force.  Limited to 350 pieces, this lithograph is hand-numbered and comes with a certificate of authenticity. A truly beautiful addition to any gallery, this Star Wars art is a must-have for fans of The Clone Wars!
nodes.name: The Dark Duel

nodes.description: Celebrating the fiftieth anniversary of the debut of Mazinger Z on television comes this totally revised and re-sculpted edition of the Soul of Chogokin Mazinger Z. Elbows open to reveal firing mechanisms, and swappable parts let you re-create 'rocket punch' scenes. Re-engineered thigh and knee joints allow for natural posability. Also includes stomach missile and Jet Scrander options.
nodes.name: GX-105 Kakumei Shinka

nodes.description: Sideshow and Hiya Toys present the RoboCop Action Figure!  A PREVIEWS Exclusive! Celebrating the 35th anniversary of the 1987 film RoboCop, Hiya Toys premieres the first item in the new Exquisite Super line: Robocop as a 1:12 scale die-cast action figure!  Compared to the Exquisite Mini series, Exquisite Super figures feature fine detailing and more accessory options. Standing 6.5' tall, this Robocop figure features a die-cast armor suit and 23 points of articulation to re-create your favorite film scenes.
nodes.name: RoboCop

nodes.description: 'There is nothing except this. There's no art opening, no charity, nothing to sign. There's the next mission, and nothing else.'  Sideshow and Grey Matter Art are proud to present the Iron Man (Foil Edition) Fine Art Screen Print!  This visually stunning Iron Man (2008) tribute by Chris Thornley (Raid71) features a colorful blueprint of what makes Iron Man tick! Presented on Holo-Foil paper, this screen print is hand-numbered and printed by Vahalla Studios.  Limited to 225 pieces, be sure to add this awesome Iron Man art print to your Marvel art collection today!
nodes.name: Iron Man (Foil Edition)

nodes.description: 'Dread It, Run From It, Destiny Arrives All The Same.'  Sideshow and Grey Matter Art are thrilled to present the mighty Road to Infinity War Fine Art Print!  Created as a stunning Avengers art collaboration from the talented likes of artists Ryan Meinerding, Andy Park, Rodney Fuentebella, Jackson Sze, & Anthony Francisco, we see earth's mightiest heroes as remembered through the valiant and often heart-breaking paths that brought them together. This collaborative, limited edition artwork seeks to remind us of all that is worth fighting for!  Don't miss your chance to add this incredible Marvel art print to your gallery today!
nodes.name: Road to Infinity War

nodes.description: Sideshow and ACME Archives are thrilled to present the Dark Aspirations Fine Art Lithograph!  This Rogue One: A Star Wars Story interpretive artwork by Candice Dailey features Darth Vader illuminated by the fiery lava with which his evolution has become synonymous.  Limited to 250 pieces, this lithograph print is hand-numbered and comes with a certificate of authenticity. A truly beautiful addition to any gallery, and a must-have for fans of Star Wars art!
nodes.name: Dark Aspirations

nodes.description: Sideshow and ACME Archives are excited to present the very aptly titled I Thought Your Were Dead Fine Art Print!  This Star Wars: The Mandalorian interpretive artwork by Christian Waggoner features a very unlucky Bib Fortuna just moments before he is dethroned by the one and only Boba Fett.  Limited to 195 pieces, this Giclee print is hand-numbered and comes with a certificate of authenticity. A truly beautiful addition to any gallery, this Star Wars art is a must-have for fans of The Mandalorian and The Book of Boba Fett!
nodes.name: I Thought You Were Dead

nodes.description: Sideshow and ACME Archives are thrilled to present the Crossing Paths Fine Art Print!  This Star Wars: The Mandalorian interpretive artwork by Christian Waggoner features a point-of-view perspective of The Mandalorian with his gaze set on an ever-ready Ahsoka Tano at the moment of their exciting introduction.  Limited to 195 pieces, this Giclee print is hand-numbered and comes with a certificate of authenticity. A truly beautiful addition to any gallery, this Star Wars art is a must-have for fans The Mandalorian!
nodes.name: Crossing Paths

nodes.description: Celebrating the fiftieth anniversary of the debut of Mazinger Z on television comes this two-pack of revised and renewed portrayals of the famed 'kikaiju' enemy robots Garada K-7 and Doublas M-2. Garada K-7's head-sickles and Doublas M-2's twisty necks have been revised to better capture their appearance from the anime.
nodes.name: GX-25R Garada K-7 and GX-26R Doubulas M-2

nodes.description: There's something spoiled rotten in the state of Sideshow…  Sideshow presents the Spoiled Apple Replica, facing off against your horror collectibles. Rosy, red-cheeked apples have long been used in Sideshow photography to give a sense of scale next to our highly detailed statues and figures. But now fame has turned this apple into a gruesome visage of its former self.  Measuring 3.56' tall, the Spoiled Apple is skinned on one side, with two lopsided eyes above a lipless mouth of yellowing teeth. Its beady, lidless gaze bores deep into the beholder's soul. Finally, the fresh, festering cuts and a black stem show that this apple has shuffled off its flesh to reflect the madness within.  Spoil yourself when you add the Spoiled Apple Replica to your horror collection today!
nodes.name: Spoiled Apple

nodes.description: Sideshow and Enesco are proud to present the Sirius Black with Wormtail Figurine!  Standing at 8.75' tall, the Azkaban escapee is seen holding Wormtail at his mighty wand's point, ready to dig in for some information.   Don't miss your chance to add this figurine to your Harry Potter collection today!
nodes.name: Sirius Black with Wormtail

nodes.description: By the Power of Grayskull! I HAVE THE POWER!   Are you ready for fabulous secret powers to be revealed? Sideshow and Tweeterhead present the He-Man and Battle Cat Classic Deluxe Maquette, the most heroic addition to your Masters of the Universe collectibles.  Representing the epic transformation of Prince Adam and his fearful feline Cringer, this deluxe maquette celebrates the characters' original two-dimensional appearances with an in-depth three-dimensional update. The dynamic He-Man and Battle Cat Classic Deluxe Maquette measures 23.25 tall, 16.75 wide, and 25.75 long as Eternia's greatest warrior and his valiant mount charge into battle. He-Man raises his sword and shield in defense of Castle Grayskull as Battle Cat leaps across the jaw-like drawbridge of the mystical keep. This maquette also includes a swap-out hand for He-Man to wield his battle axe weapon, and a sheathed sword for the warrior's back. With so many display options in your arsenal, they'll be calling you Man-At-Arms!  The He-Man and Battle Cat Classic Deluxe Maquette is fully sculpted with detailed textures and movement, from Battle Cat's green and orange fur to the flow of He-Man's iconic blonde hair. The mighty prince's costume includes his signature red and silver chest plates, fur briefs with a gold belt, and a pair of wrapped brown boots. He-Man also has two different swap-out chest plate emblems in both classic and modern designs. Battle Cat wears red armor consisting of a saddle and a spiked helmet. The forces of evil tremble before this empowered duo, prepared to fight to the finish to preserve Grayskull's secrets.  Pit He-Man and Battle Cat against the likes of Skeletor, Mer-Man, and other foes or pair them with allies like the Teela Legends Maquette by Tweeterhead, sold separately, for the ultimate Masters of the Universe display in your collection.   Harness the power of Grayskull for your own collection — bring home the Sideshow Exclusive He-Man and Battle Cat Classic Deluxe M
nodes.name: He-Man and Battle Cat Classic Deluxe

nodes.description: Sideshow and X-plus present the new King Ghidorah (2019) Collectible Figure from Godzilla: King of the Monsters!  This figure is the latest entry in the TOHO Large Kaiju Series and is poised to face Godzilla. King Ghidorah stands with it's wings out-stretched in a menacing pose, and it's neck bent expressing the power of 'Monster Zero'.  Please enjoy the power and the appearance of 'A false king'!
nodes.name: King Ghidorah (2019)

nodes.description: Sideshow and Enesco are proud to present the Abu with Genie Lamp Scene Figurine!  Abu, Aladdin's curious monkey friend, has gotten his hands on the magic lamp in this beautiful Jim Shore character sculpt. Enchanted by the secrets held within the lamp, Abu rubs his tiny paw upon the metal revealing the gregarious blue Genie inside.  Don't miss your chance to add this figurine to your Disney collection today!
nodes.name: Abu with Genie Lamp Scene

nodes.description: Once a common earthworm living a peaceful life somewhere in the Southern United States, Jim's life was forever changed when suddenly from the sky he was hit with the ultra-high-tech-indestructible-super-space-cyber-suit created by Professor Monkey for a Head for the evil Queen Slug-For-A-Butt. With his newfound powers, Jim travels across the galaxy battling evil foes in his quest to rescue the beautiful Princess What's-Her-Name from the evil clutches of Psy-Crow! Woah Nelly!  Sideshow and Premium DNA are proud to present the Earthworm Jim & Snot Action Figure. The groovy new 1:12 scale Earthworm Jim action figure stands 6' tall. He features 30 points of articulation and includes his trusty blaster, 3 Snot companions (standard, neutral backpack insert, and action pose backpack insert), 3 sets of hands, a figure stand, and 3 swappable heads.  Don't miss your chance to add Earthworm Jim to your collection!
nodes.name: Earthworm Jim & Snott

nodes.description: Sideshow and Enesco are proud to present the Grinch Checking List His List Figurine!  Grinch has his list and is checking it twice to be sure all the good boys and girls of Whoville will have the best Christmas ever. This highly detailed hand-painted resin figurine includes faux fur trim to add an extra dimension to your holiday display.  Don't miss your chance to add this figurine to your Grinch collection today!
nodes.name: Grinch Checking His List

nodes.description: Sideshow and Premium DNA Toys are proud to present the Banjo-Kazooie 2-Pack.  Gruntilda the witch has captured the beautiful Tooty, and only Banjo and Kazooie can save the day! Recreate your favorite adventures from Spiral Mountain, or create your own with the new Banjo Kazooie action figure 2-pack!  Banjo stands 7.5' tall and features 28 points of articulation for dynamic posing. He includes his banjo, interchangeable heads (smiling and mouth-closed) and banjo-playing hands, and a removable backpack.  Kazooie features 10 points of articulation and a whopping 12' wing span. She includes her trusty kazoo and separates at the waist to fit snugly in Banjo's backpack.  The duo stands nearly 10.5' from Banjo's feet to Kazooie's head feathers when combined.
nodes.name: Banjo-Kazooie

nodes.description: Sideshow and Enesco are proud to present the Robin Hood and Maid Marian Figurine!  Robin Hood & Maid Marian share an embrace in this highly detailed, hand-painted figurine from the Disney Showcase Collection. Extra detailing in their costumes and the use of faux gems and metallic paint make this piece a must for any Disney collector.  Don't miss your chance to add this figurine to your Disney collection today!
nodes.name: Robin Hood and Maid Marian

nodes.description: Sideshow and Enesco are proud to present the Red Truck with Mickey and Friends Figurine!  Loading a red pickup truck with a freshly picked Christmas tree, Minnie and Mickey Mouse pair up with Donald Duck and Goofy for a wonderful winter spent with friends in this Jim Shore design.  Don't miss your chance to add this figurine to your Disney collection today!
nodes.name: Red Truck with Mickey and Friends

nodes.description: Where simpler minds see only chaos, I see divine purpose. If that's being insane … then call me mad.   Sideshow and Premium Collectibles Studio present the Thanos 1:3 Scale Statue, an epic Marvel collectible statue inspired by the hit mobile game Marvel Contest of Champions.  The Thanos 1:3 Scale Statue measures 34 tall and 27 wide, with the Mad Titan standing in the center of a Battlerealm base that has been obliterated by his immense power. Wielding the completed Infinity Gauntlet, the villain stalks through the charred remains of bones and molten moon rock towards any resistance in his path. The gauntlet stones include a light-up feature to activate the legendary strength of these artifacts of eternity.  The Thanos Statue is fully sculpted to capture the sheer might and size of the Mad Titan. Based on his in-game character model, this cosmic champion has a textured blue bodysuit and gold metallic armor elements. Battle-worn elements of distress on the armor are mere trifles compared to the scale of destruction Thanos dishes out. Silver accents run through his updated costume along his legs, arms, and spine, and the massive statue features two portraits — one stoic in his pursuit of domination, and one snarling as he wipes out the opposition with ease.  Conquer the contest with the power of space, reality, power, soul, mind, and time! Bring home the Thanos 1:3 Scale Statue by Premium Collectibles Studio today.
nodes.name: Thanos

nodes.description: Sideshow and Enesco are proud to present the Professor Remus Lupin Figurine!  Standing at 10' tall, the Defense Against the Dark Arts Professor is seen using the music player, ready to teach his class to face their fears.   Don't miss your chance to add this figurine to your Harry Potter collection today!
nodes.name: Professor Remus Lupin

nodes.description: Silent. Invisible. Invincible. He's in town with a few days to kill.   In this 1990 sequel to the original Predator movie, the fearsome extra-terrestrial continues the hunt in the urban jungle of Los Angeles.  Hollywood Collectibles Group has accurately recreated the Hero Cutting Disc, or smart weapon as it is sometimes known, accurate to the smallest detail and complete with working electronics! The cutting disc halves pull apart in the middle to 'activate it' - just like in the movie. When in this open position the LEDs strobe to create the exact same lighting effect seen in the movie.  This intricately detailed, Museum Quality piece is constructed from resin, PU, and mixed media and then hand-painted to the finest detail, with authentic weathering for added realism!  A must-have addition to any Predator collection!  This amazing life-size Prop Replica is available in a strictly Limited Edition of 500 pieces worldwide.
nodes.name: Predator Cutting Disc

nodes.description: Sideshow and threezero are pleased to announce the new Bloodshot Figure!  Bloodshot is a violent but heroic super-soldier with nanites in his blood that give him special powers. He is the first hero of the Valiant Universe joining our FigZero S series!  Join the iconic superheroes in the fight to save the world and show how you #StayValiant!  The BLOODSHOT action figure also includes an exclusive miniature collectible Valiant comic! The BLOODSHOT Action Figure Special Collector's Edition introduces the iconic nanite fueled supersoldier to fans everywhere in a brutally action-packed story and even contains the first-ever printed edition of THE NFT GIFT short comic featuring Tama the GEOMANCER, the ETERNAL WARRIOR and IVAR, TIMEWALKER. Experience the thrilling Valiant Universe in more than one way!
nodes.name: Bloodshot

nodes.description: The Fight Remains!  The eleventh release in The Faces of the Empire™ collection features the Phase 2 Clone Troopers™. Manufactured by Kaminoan™ armor smiths, the Phase 2 armor was the cutting-edge equipment worn by the Clone Troopers™ during the final days of the Clone Wars™.   Made from 1oz of pure silver, the piece is superbly crafted to replicate the shape and color of the Phase 2 Clone Trooper's helmet. To further enhance the design, some relief has been added. The Ian Rank-Broadley effigy of Her Majesty Queen Elizabeth II is engraved on the obverse, confirming it as legal tender.   Officially licensed, each coin comes safely stored inside a Star Wars™ themed case, which includes a large window for display. To further confirm the coin's legal tender status, a Certificate of Authenticity can be found on the back of the case, along with the coin's unique number in the limited mintage of 10,000. Flip open the box to find the specifications.  These troopers are sure to shoot away fast, so target yours quickly!
nodes.name: Clone Trooper Phase II 1oz Silver Coin

nodes.description: Iron Man's Stealth Armor was first introduced in 1981's Invincible Iron Man #152 comic. Designed with stealth as its primary feature, the suit has the ability to maximize concealment by absorbing radar detection but offers fewer weapons in exchange for lightweight frame.   Sideshow and Hot Toys is delighted to unveil the diecast sixth scale Iron Man Stealth Armor collectible figure with shimmering armors in blue chrome color as the latest addition to The Origins Collection. It's a Hot Toys Exclusive item available in selective markets only.   Based on the classic Marvel Comics pages, the diecast Iron Man figure features a helmet head with LED-light up function and two styles of interchangeable masks; a distinctive streamlined design Iron Man armor and structure illustrating its mechanical detail; beautifully painted in blue coloring with a metallic appearance; blue crystal armor parts; blue chromed interchangeable masks and armor parts for different styles of display; LED light-up functions scattered throughout the upper body, Arc Reactor on chest and palms; interchangeable hands; and a Marvel figure base.   This absolutely stunning Iron Man (Stealth Suit) Sixth Scale Figure is a must-have for any Iron Man figure collector to place alongside with your Iron Man collection and Marvel collectibles display!
nodes.name: Iron Man (Stealth Armor)

nodes.description: Introduced in the Iron Man #118 comic in 1979, War Machine has proved himself a capable hero and loyal friend, someone who is reliable and faithfully patriotic throughout his comic run. He has assisted Tony Stark in countless near-death situations, put himself on the line to save the world, and eventually became a superhero on his own.  Returning to the original paint scheme inspired by the comic pages, Sideshow and Hot Toys are excited to bring War Machine as the new sixth-scale diecast Marvel collectible figure with crystal armor to extend on The Origins Collection.   The highly detailed diecast War Machine figure based on his appearance in Marvel Comics features a newly developed helmet head with LED light-up function; sophisticated armor design in matte black and metallic silver; clear crystal armor covering upper chest to waist; LED light-up Arc Reactor on chest and palms; back-mounted weapons such as machine gun and rifle gun; also a figure stand.  Pick up the special War Machine figure today to show off your marvelous Iron Man collection!
nodes.name: War Machine

nodes.description: Sideshow and Grey Matter Art are thrilled to present the Spider-Verse Lunar New Year (Connecting Variant Edition) Fine Art Print!  Featuring a connected Spider-Verse in a skyscraper-like format, this generously sized artwork was created by the acclaimed artist Jie Yuan. Bringing together a beautifully collected web of characters, this print is a must-have for fans of all things Spidey! Miles Morales, Gwen Stacy, The Amazing Spider-Man, Silk, and many more high-flying heroes abound!  Limited to 200 pieces, be sure to add this exciting Spider-art to your Marvel gallery today!
nodes.name: Spider-Verse Lunar New Year (Connecting Variant Edition)

nodes.description: Sideshow and Grey Matter Art are thrilled to present the Moon Knight #1 (Variant Edition) Fine Art Print!  The Left Fist of Khonshu is seen here in this gothic vision by acclaimed artist Marco Mastrazzo, capturing Moon Knight perched above those he protects and illuminated by an omnipresent lunar radiance. Created as a variant cover for Moon Knight #1, this Fine Art Giclee print comes hand-numbered and is printed by Grey Matter Printing.  With only 100 pieces available, you won't want to miss out on adding Moon Knight to your Marvel gallery today!
nodes.name: Moon Knight #1 (Variant Edition)

nodes.description: Sideshow and Numskull invite you to celebrate more than 30 years of the world's most iconic blue blur, Sonic the Hedgehog as we bring you this super exclusive Official Sonic the Hedgehog 30th Anniversary Statue!  Boasting an action packed scene of Dr. Eggman and Sonic in the midst of an intense fight, this statue stands at a mighty 9 tall and comes with high-level details.  If you're a huge Sonic fan, this is one collectible you definitely don't want to miss out on!
nodes.name: Official Sonic the Hedgehog 30th Anniversary

nodes.description: 'I can do this all day!'  Sideshow and Grey Matter Art are proud to present the Captain America: The First Avenger (Standard Edition) Fine Art Screen Print!  Celebrating Marvel Comics and one of its most beloved heroes to grace the Marvel Cinematic Universe, artist Juan Ramos created this beautiful tribute to Steve Rogers as Captain America. A fiery battle depiction in the foreground is shadowed by a portrait-like rendering of the proud soldier who would vow to protect the world.  Limited to 225 pieces, be sure to add this incredible Captain America print to your Marvel gallery today!
nodes.name: Captain America: The First Avenger (Standard Edition)

nodes.description: Geno Breaker, one of our most popular original products in Kotobukiya's HMM Zoids Lineup, comes revamped in an all-new repackaged version. The model has been better refined and can now be more naturally posed when shooting its Charged Particle Cannon!   Each part has been updated for a wider range of flexibility but stays true to the original coloration.   Additional all-clear and clear red parts have been included in this kit as an additional bonus item and can be customized with model paint. Be sure to add this Zoid to your very own collection today!
nodes.name: EZ-034 Geno Breaker (Repackage Version)

nodes.description: Sideshow and Numskull present from the popular shoot and loot game series Destiny, the Official Cayde-6 Statue!   A skilled gunslinger and an avid gambler, there's nothing that Cayde-6 enjoys more than the thrill of battle. His care-free attitude and loose approach to rules makes him an unpredictable adversary.  This brand-new Cayde-6 statue stands at 10 inches tall and comes with all of the finishing touches that fans would expect to see, including his rugged cloak and bright Exo eyes.  This super-exclusive collector's item is a must-have for any fan of the Destiny franchise.
nodes.name: Official Cayde-6

nodes.description: The latest in the Dynamic Action Heroes (DAH) line-up is a new take on a classic icon! Combining the technologically advanced Iron Man suit with a noble European royal red and gold medieval knight's armor, this unique mashup of old and new is a wonderful design from the minds of Beast Kingdom. Using a gold electroplating process, the armor features a glossy golden finish, and real chain mail can be seen underneath.  The Iron Man figure features 19 points of articulation and includes two interchangeable heads, four types of interchangeable hands, and a variety of medieval-inspired accessories including a sword, shield, spear, re-imagined wrist artilleries, hand-mounted repulsors, two energy effects, and a set of energy potions and bombs strapped to his waist as issued by Iron Man's trusty alchemist. This DAH figure also includes an LED light-up feature in Iron Man's Arc Reactor with intricate detailing on the armor surrounding it.  The DAH-46SP Medieval Knight Iron Man with Golden Armor is limited to only 700 pieces, so order him for your Marvel collectibles display now, before he's history!
nodes.name: Medieval Knight Iron Man (Golden)

nodes.description: 'The strongest all-purpose Zoid in the Empires!'  Iron Kong, the first large-scale item created within the HMM series, rejoins the lineup. This model kit includes the added items in the Iron Kong PK model kit: ABS elbow parts, newly-designed decals, and clear parts.  In addition to the original clear green canopy and other parts, the kit also includes additional colorless clear parts that can be customized with model paint.  Be sure to add this Zoid from the Empire's army capable of standing against Gojulas to your collection today!
nodes.name: EZ-015 Iron Kong (Marking Plus Version)

nodes.description: Sideshow and First 4 Figures is proud to present the latest PVC collectible, Okamiden: Chibiterasu Standard Edition Statue!  Chibiterasu is the main protagonist of Ōkamiden. The celestial wolf pup is also the son of Celestial Brush Goddess of the Sun, Amaterasu! And just like his mother, he wields a smaller Divine Retribution on his back. He is all white with ruby-red markings and a tail that's shaped like a calligraphy brush.  Determined and loyal, he saves the people of Nippon with the help of his partners and friends, whom he meets along the way. His adorable persona is wonderfully captured in our statue with his ready-to-play pose. The base is beautifully adorned with the Ōkami symbol and a sakura tree with traditional Japanese rope detail.
nodes.name: Okamiden: Chibiterasu Standard Edition

nodes.description: Sideshow and Taito introduce the next figure in the Spiritale 1:7 scale figure line, Hatsune Miku in her Pretty Rabbit outfit from her Birthday celebration in 2021!  Miku is ready to party in her wonderfully frilly outfit, adorned with flowers, ribbons, and rabbit ears, while surrounded by balloons!  This anime figure commemorates Miku's 14th anniversary and is an excellent addition to any Hatsune Miku figure collection.
nodes.name: Hatsune Miku - Birthday 2021 (Pretty Rabbit Version)

nodes.description: Charismatic Crucible Handler and former Warlord, Lord Shaxx commands an audience with ease. With his booming presence, unwavering conviction, and reputation as a ferocious warrior, it's no wonder he's beloved among Destiny fans. We're proud to pay tribute to his brazen character with this epic statue!  This figure is made from PVC and ABS and stands almost 12 inches tall. The base is designed with a Crucible-styled theme to match Lord Shaxx's favorite pastime. Did he remind you about the grenades yet? You really should throw more grenades. You should be throwing grenades as you read this.  Add to your collection today!
nodes.name: Lord Shaxx

nodes.description: LOOKS, PLAYS AND CONTROLS like the original Q*bert Arcade Machine!  Q*bert x RepliCade is a fully playable sixth-scale replica of the original Q*bert arcade machine presented by New Wave™ and Sideshow! Q*bert was released in 1982 by Gottlieb and was the first game designed by legendary developer Warren Davis. Q*bert x RepliCade runs the original arcade ROMs of both Q*bert and the previously unreleased sequel Faster Harder More Challenging Q*bert!  SIZED FOR COLLECTORS  Our Q*bert x RepliCade cabinet measures 11.3'H x 4'W x 5'D and weighs 2.4 lbs. This sixth-scale machine matches your 12-inch collectible figures and fits perfectly on your bookshelf, bar or desk.   PREMIUM CONSTRUCTION MATERIALS  Every detail in these amazing works of arcade art has been painstakingly reproduced, including the wood cabinet, illuminated marquee & cabinet accents, diecast metal coin door, and professionally reproduced cabinet art printed on high-quality 3M vinyl overlays.  AUTHENTIC GAMEPLAY  Q*bert features a fully functional Knocker Coil, fully customizable dipswitch settings, and premium construction materials including wood, metal, and plastics. Also features HDTV connectivity and external USB controller support so you can sit back and play on the big screen.
nodes.name: Q*Bert x RepliCade

nodes.description: One of the most signature weapons used against the forces of darkness is now available for the first time as a licensed prop replica.  The Demon Killing Knife, aka Ruby's Knife, was first introduced in Season 3 of Supernatural and is wielded by Ruby, a demon who for a time is allied with Sam and Dean Winchester. Ruby uses the weapon to dispatch demons with ease in her mission to earn the trust of Sam, who will eventually possess the blade when Ruby's treachery is revealed.  Paragon FX Group has recreated Ruby's Knife using never before seen prop reference provided by Warner Bros. Studios. Featuring a real metal blade and tang along with a detailed rendition of the stag horn handle, this is sure to be the centerpiece of any hunter's collection!
nodes.name: Demon Killing Knife aka Ruby's Knife
